This is a comprehensive master document for TaskoraвЂ”I'll route this as a premium app prototype and lock in the final workflow details.

<question-form id="task-type" title="Choose the task type">
{
  "description": "I'll route this through the right Open Design workflow and lock the brief in one shot. Skip what doesn't apply вЂ” I'll fill defaults.",
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": "taskType",
      "label": "What should I build?",
      "type": "radio",
      "required": true,
      "options": [
        "Prototype",
        "Live artifact",
        "Slide deck",
        "Image",
        "Video",
        "HyperFrames",
        "Audio",
        "Other"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "platform",
      "label": "Target platform",
      "type": "radio",
      "required": true,
      "options": [
        "iOS app (iPhone 15 Pro)",
        "Android app (Pixel)",
        "Responsive web",
        "Desktop app"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "audience",
      "label": "Who is this for?",
      "type": "text",
      "placeholder": "e.g. early-stage investors, product evaluators, internal exec review"
    },
    {
      "id": "brand",
      "label": "Brand context",
      "type": "radio",
      "options": [
        { "label": "Use the Royal Violet spec provided in the brief", "value": "brand_spec" },
        { "label": "Pick a direction for me", "value": "pick_direction" },
        { "label": "Match a reference site / screenshot вЂ” I'll attach it", "value": "reference_match" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "scale",
      "label": "Roughly how much?",
      "type": "text",
      "placeholder": "e.g. 15 screens as specified, or a specific subset first?"
    },
    {
      "id": "constraints",
      "label": "Any other important constraints?",
      "type": "textarea",
      "placeholder": "Specific interactions, navigation flow, or accessibility requirements..."
    }
  ]
}
</question-form>
